nasb.text: “If the thief is caught while breaking in and is struck so that he dies, there will be no bloodguiltiness on his account.

esv.text: If a thief is found breaking in and is struck so that he dies, there shall be no bloodguilt for him,

cnv.text: “竊賊挖窟窿入屋的時候，如果被人發現，把他打了，以致打死，打死人的就沒有流人血的罪。

ccb.text: 倘若有人打死正入屋偷窃的贼，这人不算犯杀人罪。
